professionals.name: Dr. Mammel Andrea
professionals.raw_title: csecsemõ- és gyermekgyógyász szakorvos, házi gyermekorvos, címzetes fõorvos
professionals.bio: Registered pediatric specialist. Graduated in 1976 from Pécsi Orvostudományi Egyetem; pediatric specialist qualification in 1980; working as a home pediatrician since 1983 in Pécs-Kertváros. States NEAK financing contract for the Pécs 29 pediatric practice and memberships in relevant pediatric associations.

professionals.name: Dr. Thuránszky Emõke
professionals.bio: Named as the physician seeing patients during a substitution period on June 29 and June 30.
